personal.name: Lam Nguyen

techStack.description: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces

experience.description: Leading development of enterprise web applications using React and Node.js. Mentoring junior developers and implementing best practices.
Built and maintained multiple web applications. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and improved application performance by 40%.
Developed responsive websites and web applications for various clients. Collaborated with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs.
